compatibility_notes: Official source was acquired via GitHub codeload archive after git clone instability.
Official checkpoint was downloaded directly from diffusion-policy.cs.columbia.edu with curl resume.
The official PushT keypoints runner required local compatibility patches for Python 3.12 / gym 0.26: shared_memory=False, reset API wrapper, and concatenate argument order.
Both diffusers 0.35.2 and official-era diffusers 0.11.1 were tested; 50-seed mean scores were approximately 0.918, below the checkpoint filename score 0.969 in this container.
